adapters.label: Apple iTunes Lookup
adapters.notes: Public Apple store lookup/search path that can return music track duration without Apple Music developer auth.

adapters.label: Apple Music Catalog by ID
adapters.notes: Official Apple Music catalog song fetch using a known Apple song identifier and returning durationInMillis.

adapters.label: Apple Music Catalog by ISRC
adapters.notes: Official Apple Music catalog fetch by ISRC, useful when SongSense preserves recording identifiers but not Apple song ids.

adapters.label: Spotify Track API
adapters.notes: Official Spotify track lookup by track id with direct duration_ms truth.

adapters.label: Spotify Search API
adapters.notes: Official Spotify search path using artist/title or ISRC filters to resolve track duration when a direct Spotify id is absent.

adapters.label: Spotify URL Info
adapters.notes: Lightweight scraper-style metadata extraction from Spotify URLs with no official API credentials, but weaker contractual stability.

adapters.label: MusicBrainz ISRC Lookup
adapters.notes: Open metadata fallback that can resolve recording duration from a preserved ISRC without provider-specific credentials.

adapters.label: MusicBrainz Recording Search
adapters.notes: Open metadata fallback that searches MusicBrainz recordings by artist/title and uses recording length as a best-effort canonical duration.
